name: CU-UP Coding Club
description: The flagship coding community of CU-UP, focused on competitive programming, data structures, algorithms, and building problem-solving skills through weekly contests and peer-to-peer learning sessions.

name: AI & ML Society
description: A research and project-driven society exploring artificial intelligence, machine learning, computer vision, and NLP. Members build AI-powered projects and participate in national ML competitions.

name: CyberSec Club
description: Dedicated to cybersecurity education, ethical hacking, CTF competitions, and building a security-first mindset among students. Members learn offensive and defensive security techniques in a hands-on environment.

name: Web & App Dev Society
description: Focused on full-stack web development and mobile app development. Members collaborate on real-world products, learn modern frameworks, and ship open-source projects that solve campus and community problems.

name: Robotics & IoT Club
description: Bridging software and hardware, this club focuses on robotics, embedded systems, IoT projects, and automation. Members build physical prototypes and compete in national-level robotics championships.

name: Open Source Society
description: Champions of open-source culture at CU-UP. This society helps students make their first open-source contributions, participate in programs like GSSoC and Hacktoberfest, and build publicly shareable portfolios.
